## Acceptance criteria for fix

- [ ] Bug is fixed or documented as deferred with reason.
- [ ] Regression coverage is added or a manual regression check is documented.

## Regression tests and build checks

- [ ] Add or update tests where practical.
- [ ] Run `npm run build` or document why it is skipped.
- [ ] Run `npm test -- --watch=false` or `npm run test:ci` when configured, or document why it is skipped.
- [ ] Run lint/format checks if configured.
- [ ] Check desktop and mobile widths if UI changes.

## Content/licensing impact

- [ ] No content/licensing impact.
- [ ] Fix touches bundled content or attribution and needs licensing review.
- [ ] No unapproved official Ironsworn prose, move text, oracle text, asset text, art, icons, copied layout, screenshots, or trade dress will be added.
- [ ] User-authored content remains separate from bundled app content.

## Label guidance

Use project labels later if available, such as `bug`, `regression`, `ui`, `test`, `content`, or `licensing`.
